query: SELECT u.id as userId, u.email, e.id as establishmentId, sb.balance, sb.costPerSms FROM users u LEFT JOIN establishments e ON e.userId = u.id LEFT JOIN sms_balance sb ON sb.establishmentId = e.id WHERE u.email = 'admin@admin.com';
